calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harmeet Dhillon of Dhillon Law Group telephone number 415-433-1700 for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Blute of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney telephone number 415-788-1900 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MATTHEW GALLEGOS'S Special Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 is denied in its entirety. Plaintiff concedes that his two claims for defamation and intentional infliction of emotional distress are based on protected activity, so the only issue is whether plaintiff has produced admissible evidence establishing that there is minimal merit to those claims. Plaintiff has done so. The evidence that two of the teachers who spoke to Mr. Noyes were "out on stress leave" and that Mr. Gallegos was one of only two teachers out on stress leave is sufficient to create a reasonable inference that Mr. Gallegos was one of the teachers who made the allegedly false statements to Mr. Noyes that were included in the ABC 7 video. Plaintiff has also presented admissible evidence on each element of each of his claims. The allegedly false statements made by Mr. Gallegos to Mr. Noyes are not privileged under Civil Code 47(b) because they were not made in connection with Mr. Gallegos' grievance proceeding, but, even if they were, statements made in connection with a private employer's internal grievance proceeding do not trigger the privilege of Civil Code 47(b). (Cruey v. Gannett Co. (1998) 64 Cal. App. 4th 356, 368; see also Olaes v. Nationwide Mutual Insurance Co. (2006) 135 Cal. App. 4th 1501, 1508). Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
